Coming back online

  When you come back online, you may have missed a bunch of messages. To address
  that, I want you to be able to say what messages you have already to other
  people and ask them to send you any more recent ones they have.

  

    peer3 
    
    

  

  

    peer4 
    
    

  


  
Message Order DAG


  now we want messages to be able to say what they came after.

  
Linearizing


  now we want all peers to be able to linearize the DAG in the same way.
